chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No.S-122 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 22-04-2019 -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the appellant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that this Criminal Acquittal Appeal was filed on 10.09.2018 and the office raised certain objections which have not been complied by the appellant despite availing number of opportunities. Even on the last date of hearing none was present on behalf of the appellant, which shows that the appellant in fact has lost his interest in the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal, therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
